plastic_bottle.notes: Empty and rinse before placing in blue bin

glass_jar.notes: Remove lid and rinse; lid can be recycled separately if metal

cardboard.notes: Flatten before placing in blue bin

paper.notes: Keep dry and free of food residue

styrofoam.notes: Accepted as part of Toronto's expanded 2026 Blue Box materials; rinse if food-contaminated

food_waste.notes: Place in green bin; use certified compostable liner bags only, no plastic bags

plastic_bag.notes: Not accepted curbside; check retailer drop-off bins for soft plastics

diapers.notes: Not recyclable or compostable through city programs

battery.notes: Drop off at Toronto Community Environment Days or participating retailers
